title: Button Component
content:
The `Button` component provides a versatile and customizable button element for the UI. It leverages `class-variance-authority` for defining variants and sizes, making it easy to maintain consistent styling across the application. ## Purpose To create reusable, styled buttons with various visual states and sizes, adhering to design system principles. ## Key Exports * **`Button`**: The main React component for rendering buttons. It accepts standard HTML button attributes and custom props for variant and size. * **`buttonVariants`**: A utility function from `class-variance-authority` that generates CSS class strings based on provided variant and size props. This is primarily for internal use by the `Button` component but can be used independently if needed. ## Props ### `ButtonProps` Extends `React.ButtonHTMLAttributes` and `VariantProps`. * **`asChild`** (optional, boolean): If `true`, renders the button using `Slot` from `@radix-ui/react-slot`. This allows the button to adopt the HTML tag of its parent, useful for composability. * **`variant`** (optional, 'default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link'): Defines the visual style of the button. Defaults to `'default'`. * **`size`** (optional, 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon'): Defines the size of the button. Defaults to `'default'`. * **`className`** (optional, string): Allows for custom Tailwind CSS classes to be applied to the button. * ... other standard `button` attributes like `onClick`, `disabled`, `type`, etc. ## Variants * **`default`**: The primary button style. * **`destructive`**: For actions that have negative consequences. * **`outline`**: A bordered button with a transparent background. * **`secondary`**: A less prominent secondary action button. * **`ghost`**: A button with no background, suitable for less emphasis. * **`link`**: Renders as a link with an underline on hover. ## Sizes * **`default`**: Standard button size. * **`sm`**: Small button size. * **`lg`**: Large button size. * **`icon`**: Specifically sized for icon-only buttons. ## Usage Example ```typescript import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; function MyComponent() { return (
); } ```
